levels.body: A ceremony is a multitude or a set of actions according to customs, traditions or official rules. It usually involves specific cultural, social or religious behaviours or rituals (“Ceremony, *n.*”, Sense 3).
worksCited: “Ceremony, *n.*” Oxford English Dictionary, Oxford UP, June 2025, doi.org/10.1093/OED/1180259794. Accessed 5 Oct. 2025.
